title: HAT IN ZION SEEM MEENG IN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Hat in Zion, sem meng in na nasep ding,
Miteng tungah khuavak Pasian hilh in,
Mihing khat zong khuamial sunga mangthang ding,
Phal het lo hi mihing piangsak Pa in.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Zeisu hong tatna thupha va gen meng in.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Enven mawhna khuamial thonginn mial sungah,
Mi tul tampi kihen in om uh hi.
Khat beek va pai lo a mau ko dingin ah,
A suahtak na'ng Topa si napi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Miau namkim kiang va gen in,
A mau hinna in itna Pasian hi.
Ki niam sak in a bawlsa te hong dingin,
Van nun nuam piak nading hong si suk hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Na tate sawl in tua thupha gen dingin.
Na sum tawh huh in manlang theih nading.
Na lungsim teng tawh nakpi'n thungetsak in,
Na zat khempeuh Zeisu'n hong din kik ding.
